title: Finding a Hadamard Matrix by Simulated Quantum Annealing
relevance: Demonstrates SQA for Hadamard construction; foundational method

title: Finding Hadamard Matrices by a Quantum Annealing Machine
relevance: Implementation on D-Wave hardware with QUBO formulation

title: A quantum approximate optimization method for finding Hadamard matrices
relevance: QAOA-based approach; most recent quantum method for Hadamard search

title: Quantum computing formulation of some classical Hadamard matrix searching methods
relevance: Adapts classical Williamson/Paley methods to quantum circuits
